<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Check type ID

`kind: markdown_title_matches_h1`

## Purpose

Require a frontmatter field to match the first H1 heading in the body.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `field` | no | `title` | Frontmatter key compared to the first H1. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: markdown_title_matches_h1
        field: title
```
